title: AXPlacementType
description: A flexible type that accepts various placement configurations including simple strings, connected positions, or arrays of either.

props.name: AXPlacementType
props.description: Union type that accepts a single connected position, array of connected positions, single placement string, or array of placement strings.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the placement type.

data.content: export type AXPlacementType = AXConnectedPosition | AXConnectedPosition[] | AXPlacement | AXPlacement[];
